text: I started doing something similar to this because I was bored during one of my band's practice sessions one day and the drummer just goes, "Woah man, are you the Richard Benson of bassists?" Priceless jokes aside, today my curiosity got the better of me and I wanted to see if Benson actually had played a bass at some point, and now I regret it. This hurt my soul.
